# Running This Project In VS Code

This project is not a static-only Live Server page. It needs the C++ backend because the frontend loads resources and offers from API routes.

Use:

1. `Terminal > Run Task...`
2. `Build and Run Smart Resource Exchange`
3. Open `http://localhost:3000`

Do not open `public/index.html` with Live Server on port `5500`; that will not run the backend API.
